justification: The Planner spec is comprehensive, detailed, and implementation-ready. It satisfies all acceptance criteria: Scope adherence confirmed (three submodules with explicit out-of-scope boundaries), Completeness verified (all 9 modules + 3 tests + modifications specified), Integration correctness confirmed (minimal, non-invasive T09 integration), Pattern consistency verified (follows T09 pattern), and Risk assessment favorable (open questions are not blockers).
summary: T10 Planner spec approved. Three strategy submodules (chip/, flow/, market_structure/) are fully specified with clear contracts, pure utility functions, and static test plan.
